languages.text: "Мы поняли, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Сразу как она померла, дышать легче стало".
"We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."
languages.original_text: "Мы поняли, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана. Сразу как она померла, дышать легче стало".

traits.locale_text: "We got it, heir of Seberian. As soon as it croaked, we could all breathe a little easier."
"We got it, heir of Seberian. As soon as it croaked, we could all breathe a little easier."
"We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."
"We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

languages.text: “我们知道，塞贝里安的继承人。它一咽气，我们心里都能踏实一些了。”
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: “我们知道，塞贝里安的继承人。它一咽气，我们心里都能踏实一些了。”

languages.text: "Haberimiz var Seberian'ın vârisi. O ölünce hepimiz biraz daha rahat nefes aldık."
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: "Haberimiz var Seberian'ın vârisi. O ölünce hepimiz biraz daha rahat nefes aldık."

languages.text: « Nous le savons déjà, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Dès qu'il a péri, nous nous sommes tous sentis soulagés. »
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: « Nous le savons déjà, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. Dès qu'il a péri, nous nous sommes tous sentis soulagés. »

languages.text: «Lo sabemos, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. En cuanto murió, empezamos a respirar con más facilidad».
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: «Lo sabemos, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian. En cuanto murió, empezamos a respirar con más facilidad».

languages.text: "Das wissen wir, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Als er starb konnten wir alle etwas leichter atmen."
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: "Das wissen wir, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian. Als er starb konnten wir alle etwas leichter atmen."

languages.text: 「知っていたわ、シベリアの相続人。死んだら、みんな少し楽になるわ。」
languages.original_text: "We know, heir of Seberian. As soon as it died, we could all breathe a little easier."

traits.locale_text: 「知っていたわ、シベリアの相続人。死んだら、みんな少し楽になるわ。」
